items.meaning: He left the room with any _____________________ (explain)
A group of _____________________ had an accident in the heavy snowfall yesterday. (mountain)
It was _____________________ exciting that U23 won the silver medal of Asia cup this year. (surprise
This memorial building is used to _____________________ the heroes of Vietnamese people. (memory)
The most _______________ earthquake in Japanese history damages Tokyo and Yokohama. (disaster)
A large number of car accidents are caused by fast and _______________ driving. (care)
Could you send me details of courses for _______________ who have never learnt English before. (begi
Ba's family and Liz had a very _______________ day in the countryside last weekend. (enjoy)
My sister is wearing a T-shirt of the latest model. She always dresses_______________ (fashion)
What were the reasons for the worldwide_______________crisis? (economy)
We should make the most efforts to stop _______________ (forest)
Bob gave away a _______________ sum of money to charity before he died. (consider)
Poets take _______________ from many things in life. (inspire)
The environment in our neighborhood needs to be _______________(conservation)
_______________, that student didn't do his test well. (lucky)
The wind has _______________ changed the direction. (abrupt = sudden)
My mom thinks that watching television is time- _______________ (consume)
Christmas, Halloween, Easter are important _______________ in many countries. (celebrate)
What about _______________all ordinary bulbs with energy-saving one to save electricity? (replacemen
I don't understand the _______________ circles on the wall. (mystery)
When is the entrance examination_______________ held? (office)
Smoking is ________________ in this area due to fire safety regulations (forbid)
